sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9096" key="a)niswte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνῐσωτέον</orth>, <sense id="n9096.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must make equal,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.423J.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
